title: Multilevel Class Hierarchy in Java
description: A visual representation of inheritance across multiple levels, showing how a subclass can become a superclass for another level, forming a hierarchy.
elements: Car (Subclass of Vehicle, Superclass of SportsCar)
relationships: Vehicle is inherited by Car and Truck
Car is inherited by SportsCar and ElectricCar
SportsCar is a type of Car, which is a type of Vehicle
